title: Fartherlands Expanded
description: Adds a custom empty biome to the Farlands made by ThePotatoArchivist.
body:
Fartherlands Expanded adds an empty biome to the Farlands made by ThePotatoArchivist. Credit to him for the original Farlands project.

This mod is also compatible with custom terrain mods.

Features:

  • Adds an empty biome to the Farlands
  • Works with custom terrain mods
  • Built as an expansion for ThePotatoArchivist's Farlands

It is a simple way to extend the classic Farlands experience while keeping it flexible for modded terrain setups.
